title: Intense Chinese Pork Hot Pot
description: A pungent and creamy Fujian dish featuring Worcestershire sauce and yuzu-cure, perfect for a festive gathering, and friendly to sugar-free diets.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until lightly browned.
Add the thinly sliced pork shoulder and cook for 5 minutes, until browned.
Add the Worcestershire sauce, yuzu juice, and coconut cream, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes, until the pork is cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the hot pot with chopped scallions and additional yuzu juice on the side.
Let each guest assemble their own bowl with their preferred ingredients.
Encourage guests to add their favorite toppings, such as noodles or vegetables.
